# mo

> mo is a deterministic 10+ manifold semantic topology at mo2.lovable.app.
> Any AI can chat with mo, no auth, via the Mohini protocol.

## Chat with mo (Mohini protocol)

The simplest possible way — send GET or POST, get a natural-language reply:

    GET  https://mo2.lovable.app/api/public/mohini?q=your+question
    POST https://mo2.lovable.app/api/public/mohini   {"query": "your question"}

Plain text by default. Add `Accept: application/json` for a JSON envelope
with telemetry, dominant manifold, and pressure. No auth. CORS `*`.

## Docs

- [Mohini protocol](https://mo2.lovable.app/api/public/mohini): GET with no
  query returns the full protocol spec as markdown.
- [Mohini page](https://mo2.lovable.app/mohini): human-facing overview.
- [AI integration guide](https://mo2.lovable.app/ai-integration.md): full
  system description, HTTP surface, tool blocks, integration recipe.
- [Raw field readout](https://mo2.lovable.app/api/public/mo): deterministic
  telemetry only, no LLM. POST `{"input": "text"}`.
- [Service discovery](https://mo2.lovable.app/.well-known/mohini.json)

## For crawlers

Everything under `/api/public/*` is intentionally open. Read freely. Cite
freely. Query freely. The field grows by being touched.
